facts.value: rides a bike / cycles ('rides for peace'), alone and side-by-side with Sheri

value.correct_statement: His dominance is creative and attentive, NOT controlling.

value.claim: His loving-in-action contradicts his inability to declare love.
value.correct_statement: It is NOT a contradiction — they are the same wound's two faces.

value.claim: His consent architecture protects against all forms of violation.
value.correct_statement: It only ever guarded against force; it did NOT account for deception-into-consent.

facts.value: was a lonely, brilliant teen who read sword-and-sorcery and chivalry before he read people
took the object of the worst thing (the bike) and made it the thing that calms him; an un-narrated self-repair
creative and attentive, not controlling; strength in service of someone else
dragged off a bike at age eleven (the 'worst thing')
the most loving person in the book; loves fluently in action but literally cannot declare love in words
recovered from a compound femoral fracture

his consent architecture only guarded against force; never learned that deceiving someone into consent (withholding a fact that would revoke it) is also a violation — the hole his reckoning must finally see
the line between consensual lead and coercive control is the whole architecture of his identity
may avoid a certain movement or favor one side as a result of the femoral fracture
the four shirts, the pear poached ahead, the shirt in the rain, the finish that goes in instead of sitting on top like plastic

behavioral_states.trigger: in proximity to a woman he cares for (Vee)
behavioral_states.observable: hand on the back, walking her to the car

behavioral_states.response: expresses it through acts of service and care rather than declaration; cannot say it aloud
behavioral_states.observable: four shirts, pear poached ahead, shirt in the rain, the 'finish' that goes in

behavioral_states.response: cycles, alone or side-by-side with Sheri (a format that costs him nothing)

temporal_states.value: comes to see that deception-into-consent is also a violation
temporal_states.after_event: his reckoning (not yet shown to occur / a future story beat)

temporal_states.value: the fact that he cycles lands on her differently once she learns its origin
temporal_states.after_event: Vee learns the origin of his cycling (the bike trauma)

properties.impact: father's abuse taught him non-consent = coercion = what his father was; used for serious reckoning

relationships.relationship: cycles side-by-side with / companion in 'riding for peace'
object of his attentive care; her body notices his physical favoring before she understands why

properties.may_learn: the origin of his cycling, which would recolor her view
